final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original UI design system showcase illustration featuring a web Dashboard, mobile interface, cards, buttons, and controls.

Style/medium: needs a classic minimal tech aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include multi-layer layout with web Dashboard panel, mobile interface frame, card components, button sets, and control widgets arranged in a structured system overview
Subject: must include all UI components:
  Dashboard: full web dashboard panel with data visualizations
  Mobile: mobile interface screen
  Components: cards / buttons / controls / widgets
Scene/backdrop: needs a deep-tech dark environment — exact backdrop treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a visually striking, high-impact atmosphere with strong depth and hierarchy — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a cool-toned tech direction with high contrast and luminous accent elements — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a sleek, glass-morphism or layered surface treatment — exact sheen and depth are yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must preserve clear visual hierarchy across all UI layers; all components must read as a cohesive design system
Avoid:
